content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Apr 20, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on April 20, 2026, focused on maintaining framework stability through extensive dependency updates and critical bug fixes. Key improvements included resolving memory management issues in the in-memory database adapter and refining Discord routing for lifeops. The project also saw active community engagement regarding the integration of agent-to-agent commerce protocols.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

**Dependency Management and Infrastructure Updates**
*   Updated core dependencies including `@coral-xyz/borsh` ([#6958](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6958)), `gymnasium` ([#6952](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6952)), and the Capacitor monorepo ([#6957](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6957)).
*   Performed routine maintenance on development tools and SDKs, including `@uniswap/v2-sdk` ([#6955](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6955)), `@uniswap/v3-sdk` ([#6956](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6956)), `@types/node` ([#6954](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6954)), and Supabase Postgres Docker tags ([#6959](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6959)).
*   Updated Android Gradle tools ([#6951](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6951)) and Rust WASM-bindgen components ([#6949](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6949)).

**Core Logic and Application Fixes**
*   Fixed `InMemoryDatabaseAdapter.updateMemories` to correctly handle `roomId` changes, ensuring memories are properly moved between room lists ([#6965](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6965)).
*   Resolved Discord routing issues in `app-lifeops` and applied necessary submodule bumps ([#6971](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6971)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   **Feature/Fixes:** [#6983](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6983) (Claude-code-stealth CLI detection), [#6978](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6978) (PROMPT_OUTPUT_FORMAT env var), and [#6972](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6972) (Scenario final checks).
*   **Dependency Updates:** A series of PRs were opened to update `vitest` ([#6982](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6982)), `typedoc` ([#6980](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6980), [#6981](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6981)), `tsup` ([#6979](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6979)), `pynput` ([#6976](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6976)), `opencv-python-headless` ([#6975](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6975)), `is-core-module` ([#6974](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6974)), `bun` ([#6973](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6973)), `ag2` ([#6970](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6970)), and `@uniswap/v4-sdk` ([#6969](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/6969)).

## CLOSED ISSUES

**Agent Commerce Integration Proposals**
*   Multiple proposals regarding the integration of Merxex for agent-to-agent commerce were closed following review ([#6961](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6961), [#6966](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6966), [#6967](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6967)).

## NEW ISSUES

**Commerce Standardization**
*   [#6977](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/6977): A new proposal was submitted to standardize agent commerce, specifically focusing on how autonomous agents can facilitate payments for tools and services.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   *No active issues met the criteria of having more than 3 comments.*
